name: iKG Workspace
subtitle: Official iKarwan iPA Repo's
description: Welcome to iKarwan's source! Here you'll find all of my tweked apps.

apps.name: YouTube
apps.subtitle: A whole new YouTube experience!

versions.localizedDescription:
• Added track and audio title display to the audio player.
• Added a queue view to display all available queued audio.
• Added swipe left/right gestures in the mini player to switch tracks, similar to the iOS Music app.
• Improved custom video player gestures and tap-and-hold seeking logic.
• Fixed ads that could reappear in the feed in some cases.
• Added tap-and-hold seeking to the video player.
• Please update to version 5.4 before 06/06/2026 — all earlier versions will stop working after that date.
• Added drag-down to lock while seeking.
• Added bottom-corner swipe gestures for volume control.
• Added bottom-corner swipe gestures for brightness control.
• Improved the intelligent sleep timer.
• Use native YouTube action sheets across the UI.
• Added video and audio seek controls up to 4×.
• Refined UI/UX, icons, controls, and overall interactions.
• Improved iPad layout, scaling, and player behavior.
• Applied overall code cleanup, bug fixes, and consistency improvements.
• Completely redesigned the settings UI/UX.
• Rebuilt the download manager with full list and grid views, individually selectable for videos, audio, and Shorts.
• Added new sorting options — Recent, Oldest, A–Z, and Z–A — for videos, audio, and Shorts separately.
• Added a new fluid-style download toast.
• Introduced a new full-speed download engine that uses your maximum internet bandwidth, similar to IDM.
• Added a modern new mini player inspired by iOS 26.
• Fixed audio suspension when videos or audio continue playing after entering the background or swiping home.
• Fixed playback issues with newer YouTube versions.
• Fixed a potential crash when playback fixes are enabled on newer versions.
• Improved playback stability and smoother video handling.
• Delivered multiple UI/UX improvements for a more fluid overall experience.
• Updated iPA to newer YouTube v21.20

apps.localizedDescription:
• Download videos, audio, Shorts, and post images.
• Enjoy full-speed 🚀 downloads with a built-in Download Manager.
• Built in a modern Video and Audio player.
• Built in custom Sleeptimer.
• Import videos to Photos or directly into the YTKPlus library.
• Block all advertisements for a clean experience.
• Play media in the background.
• Stream HD videos over Wi-Fi, 3G, 4G, or 5G.
• Streaming and downloading 2k-4k videos on Supported Device ip15 and later.
• Set default playback quality for Wi-Fi and Cellular.
• Customize or hide tab bar icons and layouts.
• Includes built-in SponsorBlock integration.
• Picture in Picture (PiP).
• Fake location.
• And many more settings…
• Supports iPadOS.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: This lets you add your own audio files to your videos.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: YouTube needs bluetooth access to scan for nearby Cast devices.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you create videos using the app.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Access to your network allows YouTube to discover and connect to devices such as your TV.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Makes it easier for you to attach location information to your videos and live streams and allows for features such as improved recommendations and ads.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you include audio with your videos and search using your voice.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload media you've already created.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save downloaded media to the Photos app.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Your contacts will be sent to YouTube servers to help you find friends to share videos with.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: To personalize ads and provide ad measurement, YouTube will link activity from this app with activity from non-Google apps and websites.

apps.name: Instagram
apps.subtitle: A whole new Instagram experience!

versions.localizedDescription:
• Fixed sending files as audio.
• Fixed the media picker appearing completely transparent on iOS 18.x and earlier.
• Added full compatibility with IG v429 and later.
• Please update to version 4.4 before 06/06/2026 — all earlier versions will stop working after that date.
• Added photo merging with music when audio is available.
• Fully redesigned the photo picker with a smoother liquid-style UI and smarter photo/video selection.
• Redesigned the download interface with a faster download engine.
• Delivered major UI/UX improvements across the entire tweak.
• Added full compatibility with IG v428 and later.
• Updated base IPA to Instagram v428.2

apps.localizedDescription:
• To enter the settings, go to Profile tab and click the ⚙️ Gear icon next to your Instagram name, or long-press on the Home button / Instagram logo.
• Download videos from Posts, IGTV, Reels, and DMs (HD / SD).
• Save images from Posts, Stories, private DMs, and Profiles.
• Save and merge photos with music as Slideshow.
• Block all promo ads in Feed, Stories, and Reels.
• Quick Seen/Unseen toggle for Stories and DMs.
• Ghost Typing mode.
• Hide tabs like Explore, Reels, and Create.
• Keep unsent messages + storing it in logs.
• Icon theme change iOS 18 and earlier.
• Profile analyzer (analyze fully your profile following status).
• Feed Grid & list View.
• Fake location.
• Copy text such as Comments, Descriptions, or Bio.
• Confirmation prompts before liking, commenting, calling, or reposting.
• And many more settings...
• Supports iPadOS.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This allows your phone to find and connect to the glasses using a Bluetooth connection.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This will let Instagram sync events to your calendar.
privacy.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: This will let Instagram sync events to your calendar.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's camera to do things like help you take photos, record videos and use effects.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Instagram will use your contacts to suggest people and things you care about, and offer a better service. Your contacts will be periodically synced and securely stored on Instagram's servers.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Enable Face ID for quick and secure authentication on Instagram.
privacy.NSFocusStatusUsageDescription: This allows Instagram to check to see if you've been missing notifications from friends. You can always change this later in settings.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSLocationUsageDescription: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's microphone to do things like help you record videos and preview audio effects.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your Camera Roll.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Instagram uses access to your camera roll to do things like help you share photos and videos to Instagram, apply effects and suggest photos and videos to share.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This helps Instagram personalize ads we show you.

apps.name: TikTok
apps.subtitle: A whole new TikTok experience!

versions.localizedDescription:
• Added options to disable sensitive content and warnings on posts and images.
• Added confirmations for follows, likes, and comment likes.
• Added options to hide LIVE and recommended content while scrolling the feed.
• Tapping the following status emoji now shows the current status.
• Fixed an issue where the flag button was not tappable in the previous version.
• Other improvements and enhancements.
• Please update to version 1.4 before 06/06/2026 — all earlier versions will stop working after that date.
• Updated base IPA to TikTok v45.2.0

apps.localizedDescription:
• To enter settings, long press on the Profile tab and click the ⚙️ Gear icon.
• Download videos from FEED, stories, and Explore.
• Save photos from FEED, Stories, and Profiles.
• Merge photos and music From post together.
• Save Profiles avatar or expand it.
• Block all promo ads in Feed, Stories, and Explore.
• Quick Seen / Unseen toggle for Stories and DMs.
• Hide tabs such as Friends, Create, and Inbox.
• Copy profiles bio.
• Add toggle Auto Like for live streaming.
• Stream Post from Specific country.
• Add country Flags and post Date on FEED.
• Add Follow status to Profile, following, not following, friends.
• And many more customization options...
• Supports iPadOS.

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This will allow "TikTok" to find and connect to Bluetooth accessories. This app may also use Bluetooth to connect with nearby devices.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Add events to your device calendar to get reminders when events start.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: You'll be able to record video.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Sync your contacts to easily find people you know on TikTok. Your contacts will only be used to help you connect with friends.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: We'll use this to unlock features that require added security.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: If location services are enabled, TikTok will collect, store and use your device's approximate location to improve your experience.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: To record audio, allow us to access your Microphone.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: To upload from or download to your device, allow access to your photos in your phone settings.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: To upload from or download to your device, allow access to your photos in your phone settings.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This allows TikTok to provide you with a better ads experience.
